titleStmt.title: SII 27.160: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 160. (A.R. No. 271A of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in Yeḍatāru seṭṭi's hāḍi (jungle) at Chauḷikēri.

This record which is badly damaged registers of lands probably to the temple of Śiva by Basvaseṭṭi, son-in-law of Ajara Nāraṇaseṭṭi, when Sōmaṇṇa-oḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya at the instance of Bhujabala-rāya.

The record, which apperas to have been engraved in continuation of No. 167 above, is dated the cyclic year Śukla, Chaitra śu. 1, Wednesday. As the record may be palaeographically assigned to the 15th-16th century, the corresponding English equivalent of the date would probably be 1509 A.D., March 21, in which case the inscription falls in the reign-period of Vira-Narasiṁha, the Bhujabalarāya of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mattaṁ śukla saṁvatsarada caiṁtra śu 1 budhavāradalu bhujabalarāyara nirūpadiṁda sō
maṁṇoḍeya bārakūra rājyavanu stirarājyaṁgeyiUttippa kāladalū Ajara nāra
ṇaseṭṭi Aḷiya basavaseṭṭiyarūśivālyada dharṁmaviśēṣavāgi dhāraneṟada bāḷina
vivara harihara Aṁcara moṁmakaḷu Āṁṇiseṭi dēvaṇaseṭarū tāu badda brahmadāyada mū
lada bāḷu bāpāḍiyalū basavaseṭarū biḍāruvāra mūlādiyāgi biḍisikoṁḍa bāḷacatusīme
vivara mūḍalu viṭhṭhalaseṭṭi nāraṇaseṭṭi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu nāraṇaseṭṭi ga
ḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu gōjaradabaḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yivara
gadanuḷi gaddeyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa gade 3 kke bittudu mu 5
ke bittu mu 2 kāhina huḷisaha Atū bittu mu 7 gade yi kaḷadu maneṭhāu maraphala sahavā
gi biḍāruvāravāgi biṭutegedukoṁḍa varaha ga 200 kuṁmahoḍe ṟaṁnū
varaha ga 28 �yo bāḷagēṇa Akkimu 8 basava seṭṭiru haṁdeṭinalū biḍāruvāra mūlādi māḍi
koṁḍaru hiraḷū taṁma bada brahmadāyada catussīme vivara gaḍiyiṁ
daṁpaḍuvalu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu śaṁkara kāraṁtara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu vināyaka dēvara
gaḍiyiṁ yi nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage biṭa hā lligade koḷakegade bittu ceṁmaseṭiya
ru hegeḍe gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu ḷiyāra ṁgara gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu hiraḷa makaḷa gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage hā 16 Aṁntu hā 50 gaddenū biḍāruvāruvāgi
goṁḍava ga 20 bāḷagēṇi teṟu sakaḷa Akki mu 36
seṭiyarū ya tiruma sāvaṁta sāvaṁtarū yi
bada brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷa bāḷa catusīme vivara
vāsudēvamayyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu
nāraṇaseṭṭi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu sivanātha dēvara gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu nāraṇaseṭṭi gaḍiyiṁ mū
ḍalu ma seṭṭi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yaṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁdoḷage bittu hā 22 gade
biḍāravāruvāgi biṭṭukaḍa
Akkinū basavaseṭṭiya
kaṁnyārada
Akkigēṇi mu2 hā 35 vāraṁbaḷi
seṭṭiya makkaḷu vāra mūlādiyāgi
gaḍiyiṁ paḍuva yanagaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu yiṁtī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage
Upādhyana gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa
bāḷuvo pāḍiyabāḷu meke
na bāḷanū mahikoṁḍu koṭṭaga 36 varuṣoṁdakke
Akki mu 5
mānyavāgi dēvara viniyōga muṁ naḍahudeṁdu
gōpīnātha dēvarige dharṁmmakke māḍi Antu Akkimūḍe 400 brāhmaru 14
sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthā
yi yāgi dhāreneṟa darū yi dharṁmmada voḍetanakke kuṭuṁbadavaru
tanasalladu yi dharṁmada
yī dharṁmakke Aḷupidavarugaḷige vāraṇāsiyali brāhma
ruma sāvira kavileya koṁdavaru . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāśrīyōnru
pālanaṁ . dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
